  "executive_summary": "A real-time courier bidding system built around three core primitives: (1) a Redis-backed atomic job claim mechanism using compare-and-swap to guarantee exactly-one-winner semantics, (2) WebSocket fan-out for sub-100ms bid window push to courier pools, and (3) a delayed-message scheduler for the 15-second timeout with fallback auto-assignment.
